calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-01-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On March 17, 2003
Off Calendar Mar-17-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. JUdge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Patricia Dowling. John W. Valencia, Esq. appeared in behalf of Plaintiff, L0O Soma Hotel, Inc. Nan Laigo, Controller for the Plaintiff, was sworn and examined. Exhibit #1 - Summary of Charges was marked for identification. The court receives evidence and good cause appearing, grants judgment as follows: Damages: $45,516.03, Prejudgment interest: $6,667.65, Attorney fees: $3,318.20, Costs: $310.58 for a total judgment of $55,812.46. Order signed in open court.
